message:
Expand backend test coverage with duration estimation, native engine, and edge-case tests

Backend module changes across all engine implementations and the
shared backend infrastructure:

backend/mod.rs:
- Add exhaustive tests for ConcurrentTwoLaneExecutor edge cases
  including zero-latency results, panicking lanes, and quality
  selector behavior under various latency distributions
- Add TranscriptSegment confidence boundary tests (0.0, 1.0, NaN)
- Add backend routing decision coverage for degenerate priority lists
- Add engine availability probe caching behavior tests

backend/insanely_fast_native.rs:
- Import TranscriptSegment for new test helpers
- Add estimate_duration_ms clamping tests (below minimum clamps to
  1000ms, above maximum clamps to 1800000ms, no hint defaults to
  20000ms)
- Add WAV file-based duration estimation test using generated PCM16
  mono 16kHz audio
- Add waveform-aware segmentation edge-case tests for various
  segment boundary conditions
- Add output JSON parsing tests for malformed and edge-case payloads
- Add native engine pilot conformance validation tests

backend/native_audio.rs:
- Add native audio decoder edge-case tests for corrupted headers,
  empty files, and format negotiation fallback paths
- Add sample rate conversion accuracy tests with tolerance bounds

backend/whisper_cpp.rs:
- Add command-line argument construction tests verifying correct
  flag mapping from BackendParams to whisper-cli arguments
- Add output parsing tests for edge-case whisper-cli stdout formats
- Add timeout calculation tests for duration-proportional budgets
- Add model path resolution tests for environment variable overrides

backend/whisper_cpp_native.rs:
- Add native whisper.cpp engine pilot tests for segment invariant
  preservation through the native execution path
- Add conformance shadow-run comparison tests
- Add cancellation token integration tests for native engine

backend/whisper_diarization.rs:
- Fix minor formatting in existing test assertions

backend/whisper_diarization_native.rs:
- Add native diarization engine pilot tests for speaker label
  preservation and segment timeline ordering
- Add alignment stage integration tests for word-level timestamps
- Add punctuation restoration tests for native pipeline path
- Add source separation stage tests for vocal isolation quality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
